heading: Authority of other agencies
label: 163 Authority of other agencies
text: This subchapter does not revoke or impair the authority of any other Federal agency with respect to the collection or release of information.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 13, U.S.C., 1952 ed., § 251 (, ).Sept. 7, 1950, ch. 910, § 164 Stat. 784Section was derived from part of subsection (b) of , U.S.C., 1952 ed. Subsection (a) of such section 251 is also incorporated in this subchapter, and the remainder of such subsection (b) thereof is incorporated in subchapter I of chapter 1 of this title. See Distribution Table.section 251 of title 13Changes were made in phraseology.
